title: adonis aestivalis var. flava
intro: Adonis aestivalis var. flava, also known as the yellow rocket or autumn anemone, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Adonis aestivalis var. flava include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as constipation and bloating. The plant's health benefits are largely attributed to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Adonis aestivalis var. flava often involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's roots or leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
